display_text: Gris-Gris, Cost: 0: Non-purchasable item that cannot be dropped. Stores 100% of gold lost on death and refunds it when consumed. Consuming the item permanently removes it. Stats: Death Gold Loss Reduction: 100%, Gold Interval: 3s.
